creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
This port becomes a "meta-port", because Ristretto exists in three versions.

Below slaves ports:
- ristretto01 -> 0.1.4 (default)
- ristretto02 -> 0.2.3
- ristretto03 -> 0.3.0

Note: on my FreeBSD box Ristretto (0.1.4 and 0.2.3) not work fine.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
